title: Traffic Flow Prediction using Graph Neural Networks
abstract: We propose a novel GCN for predicting traffic speed.
keywords: 图神经网络，交通流预测

title: Deep Learning for Medical Image Segmentation
abstract: A U-Net architecture for MRI brain tumor detection.
keywords: 图神经网络，交通流预测

title: A Review of Blockchain Technology
abstract: This paper reviews consensus mechanisms in blockchain.
keywords: 图神经网络，交通流预测

title: Spatio-Temporal Graph Convolutional Networks for Traffic Forecasting
abstract: ST-GCN captures spatial and temporal dependencies in road networks.
keywords: 时空图神经网络

title: ST-GCN: Spatio-Temporal Graph Convolutional Networks for Traffic Forecasting
abstract: We propose a novel graph convolutional network that captures both spatial dependencies and temporal dynamics in traffic flow data. Experiments on PeMS datasets show state-of-the-art performance.
keywords: 时空图神经网络，交通流预测

title: Remote Sensing Image Super-Resolution Using Deep Residual Networks
abstract: This paper presents a deep learning approach for enhancing the spatial resolution of satellite imagery. We employ residual learning to reconstruct high-resolution images from low-resolution inputs.
keywords: 遥感图像超分辨率，深度学习

title: BERT for Natural Language Understanding: A Comprehensive Survey
abstract: We review the development of transformer-based models like BERT for various NLP tasks including sentiment analysis, named entity recognition, and question answering.
keywords: 时空图神经网络，交通流预测

title: Graph Neural Networks for Molecular Property Prediction
abstract: We apply graph convolutional networks to predict chemical properties of molecules. The model learns representations of molecular graphs for drug discovery applications.
keywords: 图神经网络，交通流预测

title: A Brief Mention of GNNs in Urban Planning: Challenges and Opportunities
abstract: This position paper discusses various urban planning paradigms. Graph neural networks are mentioned as a potential tool, but no implementation or experiments are provided.
keywords: 图神经网络，城市规划

title: Multi-Task Learning for Remote Sensing Scene Classification
abstract: We propose a multi-task framework that jointly learns scene classification and land cover segmentation from aerial imagery. Shared representations improve both tasks.
keywords: 遥感场景分类，多任务学习

title: Federated Learning for Privacy-Preserving Healthcare Analytics
abstract: We develop a federated learning protocol for hospitals to collaboratively train models without sharing patient data. The system preserves privacy while maintaining model accuracy.
keywords: 时空图神经网络，交通流预测

title: Attention-Based Spatio-Temporal Modeling for Crowd Flow Prediction
abstract: We design an attention mechanism to capture long-range spatial dependencies and temporal patterns in urban crowd movement. Evaluated on taxi and bike-sharing datasets.
keywords: 时空预测，注意力机制

title: Transformer Architecture: The Foundation of Modern NLP
abstract: This tutorial explains the transformer architecture from scratch, covering self-attention, positional encoding, and multi-head attention mechanisms used in language models.
keywords: 遥感图像分割，深度学习

title: LiDAR Point Cloud Classification Using 3D Convolutional Neural Networks
abstract: We propose a 3D CNN architecture for classifying airborne LiDAR point clouds into ground, vegetation, and building categories. The method achieves high accuracy on urban datasets.
keywords: 点云分类，三维卷积

title: Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Driving: A Survey
abstract: This paper reviews reinforcement learning algorithms applied to self-driving cars, including policy gradient methods, Q-learning, and model-based approaches for navigation tasks.
keywords: 时空图神经网络，交通流预测

title: Deep Learning Meets GIS: A Review of GeoAI Applications
abstract: We survey the intersection of deep learning and geographic information systems, covering applications in urban analytics, environmental monitoring, and spatial epidemiology without specific methodology.
keywords: GeoAI，深度学习应用

title: Spatio-Temporal Graph Attention Networks for Origin-Destination Flow Prediction
abstract: We introduce a graph attention network that models dynamic OD flows between regions. The model captures both spatial interactions and temporal evolution using attention weights.
keywords: OD 流预测，图注意力网络

title: Computer Vision for Agricultural Crop Monitoring Using Drone Imagery
abstract: We apply object detection and segmentation models to UAV-captured images for identifying crop types and estimating yield. The system uses YOLO and Mask R-CNN architectures.
keywords: 遥感图像分析，农业应用

title: Large Language Models: Capabilities, Limitations, and Future Directions
abstract: This perspective article discusses the emergence of large language models, their emergent abilities, alignment challenges, and potential societal impacts across various domains.
keywords: 时空图神经网络，交通流预测

title: Graph Convolutional Networks: A Theoretical Overview
abstract: We provide a mathematical foundation for graph convolutional networks, discussing spectral and spatial approaches, but without any application to traffic or spatial-temporal data.
keywords: 图神经网络，交通流预测

title: Change Detection in Remote Sensing Images Using Siamese Networks
abstract: We propose a siamese neural network architecture for detecting land use changes between multi-temporal satellite images. The model learns discriminative features for pixel-wise change detection.
keywords: 遥感变化检测，孪生网络

title: Blockchain Technology for Secure Data Sharing in IoT Networks
abstract: We explore how blockchain can enable secure and decentralized data sharing among IoT devices. The paper discusses consensus mechanisms and smart contracts for access control.
keywords: 时空图神经网络，交通流预测

title: Neural Ordinary Differential Equations for Continuous-Time Traffic Dynamics
abstract: We model traffic flow as a continuous dynamical system using neural ODEs. This approach captures smooth temporal evolution and outperforms discrete-time models on highway datasets.
keywords: 交通流建模，神经微分方程

title: A General Framework for Graph Representation Learning
abstract: This paper introduces a unified framework for learning node and graph embeddings. While graph methods are discussed, no specific application to spatial-temporal or geo-data is presented.
keywords: 图神经网络，时空预测
